title: Model 10-T monorail
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:10-t.jpg|thumb|250px]]
The '''Model 10-T monorail''' was a [[Train/Legends|train]] for passenger [[Transport/Legends|transport]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. It included such features as dining cars and underside [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] units in every wagon. The [[Vohai Unirail]] was A Model 10-T monorail.

==Sources==
